programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teacher have been compiled to make you a better ball striker; Nathalie Sheehan reveals how to eliminate fat contact, Chris Como teaches his Statue of Liberty Drill and Martin Hall goes in-depth.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teachers have been compiled to improve your short game; Devan Bonebrake reveals how to make perfect chipping contact, Aimee Cho teaches how a towel can improve your pitch shots and Martin Hall featured.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: The top tips from the world's best teachers have been compiled to help you out of greenside bunkers; Devan Bonebrake shares Jordan Spieth's sand secret, Nathalie Sheehan teaches a unique grip for bunker shots and James Oh featured.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you add distance and hit more fairways with the driver by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish learning the biggest keys and drills.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you hit more greens and make more powerful contact with the irons by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Ultimate Distance
programme.desc: Ultimate Distance is your step-by-step blueprint to hitting it longer and more consistently than ever before; breaking down key moves that generate power with the driver while also teaching you how to dial in your iron distances for total control.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Ultimate Distance
programme.desc: Ultimate Distance is your step-by-step blueprint to hitting it longer and more consistently than ever before; breaking down key moves that generate power with the driver while also teaching you how to dial in your iron distances for total control.

programme.title: The Conor Moore Show
programme.desc: The most popular comedy skits and sketches from three seasons of The Conor Moore Show; from marriage counseling to the best (or worst) swing coach in the world, Conor and friends are guaranteed to provide a laugh.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: What an alternate golf universe looks like; troubles lefties face in golf; a new product that could be the next big thing in golf.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, all the ways to make sure you can practice like a pro.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Nikki B teach the setup and swing keys for stopping the slice. Learn how to drive for show and dough with drills involving a wallet and a dollar bill. Martin also uses the Wall of Learning to improve the backswing and downswing.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, a look at the key process of perfecting your drive, chip and putt.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Nikki B team up to reveal what to learn from some of golf's other great teams; Davis Love shares a favorite drill he learned from his father; the ball striking breakthrough Bernhard Langer made with his long-time coach.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando and teaches how to maximize distance and accuracy with the driver. Learn a backswing tip used by Jack Nicklaus and a simple solution for center face contact.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach how to stick approach shots. Also, Martin shares a ball striking drill used by Annika Sorenstam, teaches ways to improve balance, and reveals why wrinkles are good.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the practice tee at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach his 5 Ps of shot shaping, with pre-swing fundamentals, drills using props from a toolbox, and a visual practice station to improve hitting draws and fades.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range to show what aspects to takeaway from the unique swings of legendary players. Martin features Arnold Palmer's helicopter finish and the drastic difference between Annika Sorenstam and Lorena Ochoa's impact position.

programme.title: Golf Channel Games
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach how to practice like the pros. He reveals his best drill for solid contact and shares Ben Hogan's advice for direction control.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall hits the range to teach how to correct, fat, thin, heel, and toe shots with the irons. Hall also shares his favorite drill for consistent solid contact and reveals a tip on how to improve from baseball pitchers.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall teaches the key shots to master to save strokes around the green; how to hit crisp pitch shots like Collin Morikawa; improve bunker play from short game guru Dave Pelz; when to use wedge, putter, or hybrid from just off the green.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Instructor Martin Hall provides tips and drills utilizing an in-studio golf simulator.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall teaches the putting pointers used by the best players in the world. Martin reveals how improve on the green with a credit card and a coin; a distance control tip from Ben Crenshaw; a direction drill from Henrik Stenson.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach drills centered around getting more distance. Learn how Davis Love III trains to increase swing speed. Plus, Martin teaches a technique used by Olympic sprinters that translates into crushing it off the tee.
